faqs.question: How do I buy an AI agent?
faqs.answer: Browse the marketplace, select an agent, and click Buy Now to complete your purchase.

faqs.question: How do I become a seller?
faqs.answer: Click 'Become a Seller' and complete the onboarding process with your payment details.

faqs.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards through Stripe, PayPal, and Razorpay.

faqs.question: How do refunds work?
faqs.answer: Contact the seller within 7 days for refund requests. We mediate disputes fairly.
